findings.title: Missing Rate Limiting on Authentication Endpoint
findings.description: The authentication endpoint at https://brainapp.in/oauth/token does not appear to implement rate limiting. 10 rapid requests all received non-429 responses.
findings.impact: An attacker can perform credential brute-force attacks without throttling.
findings.remediation: Implement rate limiting (e.g., 5 attempts per minute) on login endpoints. Consider account lockout after repeated failures and CAPTCHA challenges.

findings.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy Header
findings.description: No CSP header is set on https://brainapp.in.
findings.impact: Without CSP, the application has no browser-enforced protection against XSS attacks.
findings.remediation: Implement a strict Content-Security-Policy header.

findings.title: Missing Clickjacking Protection
findings.description: Neither CSP frame-ancestors nor X-Frame-Options is set on https://brainapp.in.
findings.remediation: Add Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors 'self' or X-Frame-Options: DENY.

findings.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy Header
findings.description: No CSP header is set on https://trackswift.brainapp.in.
findings.impact: Without CSP, the application has no browser-enforced protection against XSS attacks.

findings.title: Missing Clickjacking Protection
findings.description: Neither CSP frame-ancestors nor X-Frame-Options is set on https://trackswift.brainapp.in.
findings.remediation: Add Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors 'self' or X-Frame-Options: DENY.
